title: stelis aenigma
intro: Stelis aenigma is a species of orchid native to Costa Rica, characterized by its unique and relatively unknown properties. As an orchid, it has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis aenigma are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and fight infections, making it a potential remedy for various conditions. Herbal preparations of Stelis aenigma are typically made by drying the plant material and infusing it in hot water or oil, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
